entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: A legume crop (Arachis hypogaea L.) screened for pest resistance

entities.name: JASSID
entities.description: A pest (Empoasca kerri Pruthi) that affects groundnut

entities.name: THRIPS
entities.description: A pest (Frankliniella schultzei (Trybom)) that affects groundnut

entities.name: TERMITES
entities.description: Pod scarifying pests (Odontotermes sp.) that affect groundnut

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of groundnut genotypes to withstand attacks from pests

entities.name: FIELD SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating genotypes in the field to identify resistance

entities.name: BREEDING PROGRAM
entities.description: The systematic process of improving crop varieties

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: The organization where the breeding program is conducted

relationships.description: Groundnut genotypes were screened for resistance to pests
Resistance was evaluated against the jassid pest
Resistance was evaluated against the thrips pest
Resistance was evaluated against pod scarifying termites
Field screening was used to identify sources of resistance
Field screening was performed on groundnut genotypes
The breeding program focuses on improving groundnut
Genotypes with multiple resistance were used in the breeding program
